message:
feat(codegen): Add callback-style APIs to ExprEmitter

New ExprEmitter APIs for callback-based block patterns:

- withLabeledBlock2(): Two temp variables pattern
- withBlock(): Most flexible - callback handles everything
- withMutableBlock(): var instead of const for temp
- nestedBlock(): Create nested labeled blocks

New LabeledBlock helpers:
- emitExpr(): Emit AST node inside block
- breakWithCallback(): Complex break values via callback
- nested(): Create nested block from parent
- nestedWithVar/nestedMutable(): Nested with temp var
- getLabelId/getPrefix(): Access block properties

Migrate unary BigInt operations:
- BigIntNegateCtx: clone and negate pattern
- BigIntInvertCtx: ~n = -(n+1) pattern
- UnknownNegateCtx: Type check with nested BigInt block
